title: Zyliss Large Ladle, Oak Wood Handle, Soup Ladle for Cooking and Serving with Heat Resistant PBT Head, Anti-Scratch for Non Stick Pans, 30cm, Handwash Only
features: Deep Ladle Head: The shape of the ladle head delivers generous servings of soups, curry, broths and stews
Heat Resistant PBT Head: The head is made from durable PBT and is heat resistant up to 200°C / 392°F
Oak Handle: Durable FSC certified oak wood handle with a comfortable, natural grip and is heat resistant up to 150°C
Non Stick Safe: The PBT head is designed not to scratch or damage non stick cookware such as frying pans and air fryer trays
Handwash Only: To preserve the life of the premium oak wood handle we recommend handwash only
description: From the manufacturer Zyliss. the cleverly swiss brand. Do you know Karl Zysset? You probably know his inventions. From the garlic press to the onion chopper to the salad spinner: the kitchen as we know it today would be unthinkable without Karl. From Switzerland, he has changed cooking worldwide. His drive was to bring joy to the kitchen through technical innovation and outstanding design. Through the materials used, through the efficient preparation of food and, of course, through an uncompromising commitment to quality and durability. Oak Wood Utensils Premium Quality Kitchen Utenils Crafted with a smooth, FSC-certified oak handle, it feels naturally balanced and sturdy in your hand the Oak Wood Utensils are a thoughtful tool that helps you cook with care, style, and confidence.
